title: Being able to attach files to email sequence feature
excerpt: The email sequence feature doesn’t support sending attachments yet. I know this is something many users are looking for. Please support my request.

posts.author: Lima (Lima Dassouky)
posts.cookedHtml: The email sequence feature doesn’t support sending attachments yet. I know this is something many users are looking for. Please support my request.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You’ll want to add this to the feature requests section instead of platform discussions.
